name: AEHR TEST SYSTEMS
business: Aehr Test Systems provides test solutions for testing, burning-in, and stabilizing semiconductor devices in wafer level, singulated die, and package part form, with products including the FOX-P family, WaferPak Contactors, and DiePak Carriers. The company sells to semiconductor manufacturers, contract assemblers, electronics manufacturers, and test service companies worldwide.

exposures.sentence: The applications include artificial intelligent ( AI ) compute data centers, electric vehicles, electric vehicle charging infrastructure, solar and wind power, data and telecommunications infrastructure, and solid-state memory storage.

The applications include artificial intelligent ( AI ) compute data centers, electric vehicles, electric vehicle charging infrastructure, solar and wind power, data and telecommunications infrastructure, and solid-state memory storage.

Silicon carbide power semiconductors have emerged as the preferred technology for battery electric vehicle power conversion in on-board and off-board electric vehicle battery chargers, and the electric power conversion and control of the electric engines.

The applications include artificial intelligent ( AI ) compute data centers, electric vehicles, electric vehicle charging infrastructure, solar and wind power, data and telecommunications infrastructure, and solid-state memory storage.
The silicon photonics market is seeing increasing deployment of devices used in the expansion of bandwidth and infrastructure to meet the explosive growth of data center and 5G infrastructure.
Sensors used in mobile devices such as smartphones, tablets, wearables such as watches and fitness bands, and audio devices have become pervasive.

The Company also sees new developments in the data storage and memory markets as new opportunities for its systems where these end markets and customers require devices to have extremely high levels of quality and long-term reliability.

catalysts.sentence: The Company paid $11.1 million to acquire Incal

catalysts.event: Introduction of High Power FOX-XP in connection with Incal acquisition
catalysts.sentence: The introduction of the High Power FOX-XP in connection with the acquisition of Incal Technology, Inc., our new line of high-power packaged part reliability/burn-in test solutions enables Aehr the unique ability to deliver wafer level test and burn-in and package part burn-in for AI accelerators, GPUs, and high-performance computing ( HPC ) processors.
